name: obsidian-task-center
description: AI-ready task board for Obsidian Tasks with day/week/month views, natural-language Quick Add, task trees, mobile gestures, and CLI commands over plain markdown.

scripts.test:unit: node --test test/parser.test.mjs test/writer.test.mjs test/cli.test.mjs test/quickadd.test.mjs test/cache.test.mjs test/task-tree.test.mjs test/i18n.test.mjs test/wdio-versions.test.mjs test/wdio-local-guard.test.mjs test/release-metadata.test.mjs test/task32-daily-folder.test.mjs test/source-dialog-api.test.mjs test/tags.test.mjs test/saved-views.test.mjs test/date-filter.test.mjs test/time-filter.test.mjs test/layout.test.mjs test/filter-popover.test.mjs test/main-lifecycle.test.mjs test/github-workflows.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e:ci: pnpm run build && wdio run ./wdio.conf.mts --spec test/e2e/specs/board-basics.e2e.ts
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: CorrectRoadH
